title: Ring of Flight
description: A mod for 1.19+ that adds a simple ring of flight to your game
body:
## This is a mod that adds a new ring of flight to your game that you can equip in your offhand to gain flight.

<center>

### Join our discord to stay up to date with mod updates, teasers, and more! (click)
[![Discord banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cea9cd7dc8511b56c21d5eef30b040a9f9f81d2.png)](https://discord.gg/mEYDh4SUWN)

</center>

(If you find a bug, report it on the [curseforge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wolfys-ring-of-flight))

#### Thanks for 5k downloads!

## Overview

>Ring Base

Crafted with 4 gold blocks, used to make the Ring of Flight

>Ring of Flight

Crafted with a ring base, 1 amethyst shard 2 elytras and a nether star, it can grant creative flight when equipped in your offhand

![Ring of Flight and Base Ring](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/nk3V3NXc/images/da69b1905a83df4d5aafa67e11cc323573de2ff4.png)

## Q&A

> Q: Will you add any new features to this mod?

A: No. I am not working on this mod anymore.

> Q: Will you backport fabric to below/above 1.20.1 and 1.20.4? Or forge below/above 1.19.2?

A: No. Porting versions is buggy, annoying and generally unenjoyable. Modding is my passion project. If i dont enjoy modding, i won't mod. The only exception is most likely 1.19.4 Forge and 1.18.2 Forge

> Q: Can i use this in my modpack?

A: Sure, You can give credit if you want, but i won't enforce it.
